questionHtml: Probes are used to monitor significant variables within the fermenter. List three significant variables that should be monitored in the fermenter.
markschemeHtml:
a. pH/acidity/alkalinity ✔

b. foam ✔

c. metabolites ✔

d. substrate ✔

e. oxygen ✔

f. carbon dioxide ✔

g. temperature ✔

h. pressure ✔

Accept other valid condition
